checklist_rows.detail: The rehearsal stays inside the admitted `cuda_4080_decision_grade` pre-flight contract on run `tailrun-home-admitted-20260328k` with blocking rule `any_red_item_blocks_launch` and required export-plan evidence frozen before launch.
The retained 4080 run survives interruption with checkpoint `checkpoint://swarm/first-swarm-live-plan/policy` at step `12` and bounded replay loss of 12 steps / 12 samples.

The rehearsal uses incident class `transient_interruption` with default action `continue_from_last_green_checkpoint` under review rule `must_be_logged_in_weekly_review` while the retained recovery packet keeps stale-worker disposition `replay_required`.

The retained export packet keeps transformer model `tassadar-article-transformer-trace-bound-trained-v0` export-ready with checklist rows `portable_bundle_import_plan_green, portable_bundle_roundtrip_green, cpu_aarch64_route_green, reference_linear_anchor_green, hull_cache_fast_route_green, replacement_publication_green`.

Replacement validation stays green because row `psion_executor_local_cluster_ledger_row_mlx_v1` is not blocked by unified throughput review and serving floor row `serving_throughput_regression_candidate` stays `green_serving_throughput_floor`.
The rehearsal result is logged against workflow `psion_executor_local_cluster_review_workflow_v1` so interruption, recovery, export, and replacement stay visible in the canonical review path.

review_log.detail: The canonical review workflow `psion_executor_local_cluster_review_workflow_v1` now has one retained rehearsal log for run `tailrun-home-admitted-20260328k` covering pre-flight admission, transient-interruption recovery, export inspection, and replacement validation without any active replacement block ids.

summary: The admitted executor lane now has one canonical long-run rehearsal packet. It binds the 4080 transient-interruption recovery contract, the phase-two pre-flight contract, the export and replacement-validation receipts, and the canonical review workflow into one machine-readable rehearsal result before broader long-run claims are trusted.
